chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3138 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.13965/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.03.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Khalil Ullah Jakhro, advocate for the respondents 2 & 3. Petition is pending since 2024, even notice has not been issued till date. Irrespective thereof, order sheet denotes that mandatory injunction has been granted on the first date, whereby provisional release has been ordered and as a consequence, finalization of GD remains pending. No case is made out to entertain this direct recourse in writ jurisdiction. The department may finalize the assessment in accordance with law and petitioner shall remain at liberty to challenge the same in statutory hierarchy, if aggrieved. In view of foregoing, petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
